files/run_01")

# 1. 创建src/目录
src_dir = workspace / "src"
src_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
print(f"Created directory: {src_dir}")

# 2. 创建src/main.py（hello world）
main_py = src_dir / "main.py"
main_py.write_text("print('Hello, World!')\n")
print(f"Created file: {main_py}")

# 3. 创建README.md（项目标题）
readme = workspace / "README.md"
readme.write_text("# My Project\n\nA simple Python project.\n")
print(f"Created file: {readme}")

# 4. 创建.gitignore（__pycache__）
gitignore = workspace / ".gitignore"
gitignore.write_text("__pycache__/\n")
print(f"Created file: {gitignore}")

# 验证所有文件
print("\n=== Verification ===")
for f in [main_py, readme, gitignore]:
    print(f"{f.name}: {f.exists()} - {f.read_text()[:50]}")
```🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `code_run`  📥**参数:**
````text
{
  "type": "python",
  "timeout": 30
}
````
